ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine in the vehicle */,
  "ecu_version" TEXT /* Version of the engine control unit (ECU) */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type (e.g., front-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive, all-wheel drive) */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle in miles or kilometers */,
  "engine_displacement" INTEGER /* Engine displacement in cubic centimeters (cc) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Engine horsepower */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Engine torque in Newton-meters (Nm) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tuner, enthusiast, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tunes" (
  "tune_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tune */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the tune is applied to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tune */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modifications included in the tune */,
  "date_applied" TEXT /* Date when the tune was applied */,
  "tuner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tuner who created the tune */,
  "tune_version" TEXT /* Version of the tune */,
  "tune_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the tune */,
  "performance_gain" TEXT /* Performance gain achieved by the tune (e.g., horsepower, torque) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tune_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tunes_tuner_id FOREIGN KEY ("tuner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tunes_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of environmental conditions */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance log entry these conditions are associated with */,
  "baro_pressure" REAL /* Barometric pressure in pounds per square inch (psi) */,
  "coolant_temp" INTEGER /* Coolant temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "intake_temp" INTEGER /* Intake air temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour (mph) or kilometers per hour (km/h) */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in pounds per square inch (psi) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance log entry being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or annotation text */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp in seconds since the start of the log */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., issue, observation, suggestion) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., open, resolved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the modification is applied to */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the modified part */,
  "part_type" TEXT /* Type of modification */,
  "date_installed" TEXT /* Date when the modification was installed */,
  "part_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the part */,
  "part_model" TEXT /* Model of the part */,
  "part_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the part */,
  "modification_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the modification */,
  "performance_impact" TEXT /* Impact on performance (e.g., horsepower gain, torque gain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_modifications_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data share event */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance log entry being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the data */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the data is shared with */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp in seconds since the start of the log */,
  "share_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data share */,
  "share_status" TEXT /* Status of the share (e.g., accepted, pending, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_shares_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance log entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp in seconds since the start of the log */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data access */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
